meaning: adj.未剪过毛的 未修剪过的 未修面(或刮脸)的
examples: Finally, only one outward symbol remained to remind him that he had been set apart for a special work of deliverance for his people — his unshorn hair.
Hasan's attorneys say the beard is an expression of his religious beliefs, but the unshorn facial hair is in violation of Army grooming regulations.
